items.title: Get up to 50% combined Earth Day savings on Navee e-scooters, like the budget-friendly V25 at its $221 low, more from $140
items.summary:
Navee has launched its Earth Day EV Sale with up to 35% discounts on e-scooters – plus, a bonus 15% sitewide extra savings code, too. One notable budget-friendly return from last month’s Spring Sale is the V25 Electric Scooter down at $221 shipped, after using the code NVEARTH15 at checkout, beating out its Amazon pricing by $79. The initial discount here is dropping things from $380 to $260, with the extra sitewide savings dropping things further to its $221 low we first spotted in March. Now, you’re getting a second chance at its newest all-time low price, giving you a budget-friendly commuting option with $159 in total savings. Of course, there’s also the upgraded V25 Pro Electric Scooter down at $255 shipped, after using the code NVEARTH15 at checkout. Head below to check out all the other deals during this event, as well as some of the higher-end models not seeing discounts, but able to benefit from the bonus savings code.
